auth_notes: Requires creating an app in the Wix Developers Center for OAuth 2.0 flow, or generating a Site API Key (for private site access) which requires specific permission scopes and the Site ID.
rate_limits: Standard limit is 200 requests per minute per site/app, though specific endpoints may vary.
gotchas: API permissions (scopes) are extremely granular; missing one will result in 403 errors even with a valid key.
The 'wix-site-id' header is mandatory for most requests and is distinct from the Account ID.
Accessing custom database collections often requires writing a small amount of Velo (JavaScript) code within Wix to expose a custom HTTP endpoint.
client_must_provide: List of required data scopes (e.g., Contacts, Store, Bookings)
research_notes: Integration should use the HTTP Request node. Authentication headers must include 'Authorization' and 'wix-site-id'. For webhooks, the user must register an App in the Wix Dev Center and configure the 'Webhooks' section to point to the n8n production URL.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration should use the HTTP Request node. Authentication headers must include 'Authorization' and 'wix-site-id'. For webhooks, the user must register an App in the Wix Dev Center and configure the 'Webhooks' section to point to the n8n production URL.
